originalTitle: Meta's plan to launch a cloud business eases the biggest overhang on the stock
summary: The stock's struggles in 2026 had been due to concerns about its aggressive AI spending.
content: The stock's struggles in 2026 had been due to concerns about its aggressive AI spending.
chineseTitle: Meta 推出云业务的计划缓解了该股最大的压力
chineseSummary: 该股在 2026 年的困境是由于对其激进的人工智能支出的担忧。
chineseContent: 该股在 2026 年的困境是由于对其激进的人工智能支出的担忧。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
